friendly_name: CLI Bug Sweep & Tool Surface Self-Registration
purpose_context: A targeted sweep that removes a stale xfail masking an already-fixed init-flow bug, closes a pathological test coverage gap in branch naming, repairs three interlocking charter bundle validation failures caused by a plural/singular directory mismatch in the synthesizer, and eliminates parallel-lane merge conflicts in the tool surface via a self-registration seam modeled on the existing MigrationRegistry pattern.
purpose_tldr: Resolve four tracked defects: stale init-flow xfail, branch naming coverage gap, charter bundle validation failures, and tool surface parallel-lane merge conflicts.
